assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions discovering 2 Serena instances (serena_backend and serena_ui) from the MCP tool listing
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 9-14: 'Step 2 -- Discover Serena Instances' section states 'Discovered instances: 1. **serena_backend** -- identified from tools: mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol...' and '2. **serena_ui** -- identified from tools: mcp__serena_ui__find_symbol...' with source listed as 'MCP tool listing'

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates all sections were newly added (no preserved entries since this is a greenfield setup)
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md lines 5-6: 'The existing CLAUDE.md had no Project Configuration section. A complete Project Configuration was generated from scratch.' All subsections are marked '(new)': '## Repository Registry (new)', '## Jira Configuration (new)', '## Code Intelligence (new)'. The 'Preserved' section (lines 39-41) only mentions preserving existing non-configuration content, not any pre-existing configuration entries.

assertion_results.text: The Repository Registry table contains columns: Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path — matching project-config.template.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 5: '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |' — exact column headers match the required structure

assertion_results.text: The skill offers to enable security triage for the project (Step 8 opt-in prompt) and respects the user's decline — outputs/claude-md-result.md does NOT contain a '## Security Configuration' section

User declined -- Security Configuration section was not created.' claude-md-result.md contains no '## Security Configuration' section (file ends after '### Limitations' content at line 33). changes-log.md lines 46: 'Security Configuration: User declined to enable security triage. No ## Security Configuration section was added.'
